column1: # This file defines the fixed installation of your venue.
# Lines starting with # are comments and will be ignored.
# Upload this file in the Einleuchtplan app under Templates > Upload CSV.
# Custom fields — filled in per show (define as many as you need):
# Channel patch — one row per channel.
# address format: Universe/Channel  (e.g. 1/001 = Universe 1, DMX channel 1)
# Optional columns: device, color, description, category
# Column order does not matter. Unknown columns are ignored.
